texto: It's just us, right?'Hannah walks to her. She touches her cheek and finds her eyes. There is a desperate light hanging on her pupils. A flicker of passion, a flicker of shame.'It's just us.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kelly Quindlen que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “It's just us, right?'Hannah walks to her. She touches her cheek and finds her eyes. There is a de…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, lgbt, flicker, com foco em reflexao.
